title: Rei III Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: Rei III > Kaworu?             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 18, 2010 2:26 am ThePRPD's post in the AT-Field Deployment thread got me wondering, and I can't seem to remember it ever being discussed here, at least not in my time. In 24, Kaworu's AT-Field was the strongest ever recorded, and his power, undoubtedly, surprised everybody. However, upon reaching Terminal Dogma, another far more powerful AT-Field appeared, belonging to none other than Rei III. This is where my question comes in: why was Rei's AT-Field so significantly stronger than Kaworu's? They're so alike in many ways, but this is one of their larger differences. They both carry the soul of a Seed of Life, so an obvious conclusion would be that their AT-Fields are much more powerful than their offspring. And at this point, it's speculated that Rei had the entire (or just the vast majority) soul of Lilith. Since there's nothing to really state otherwise, one can infer that Kaworu also holds the entire (or vast majority) soul of Adam. So, the amount of soul they each possess should be around equal. My brief pondering on the subject has led me to two possible conclusions: 1) At that point, in Terminal Dogma, Kaworu's AT-Field had either weakened due to the fighting with Unit-01, or he had weakened it himself in preparation of surrendering himself to Shinji. 2) Due to the proximity to Lilith, Rei's AT-Field was more powerful due to a sort of resonating force between the two bodies? If the remaining fraction of the soul was within Lilith, while everything was in Rei, than the soul worked in full against Kaworu's possible fraction of a soul. But if I truly knew what I was talking about, I wouldn't be asking you guys. So, what does everybody else have to think about this? Sauce and further input would be great.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Thu Feb 18, 2010 5:23 am It's really funny you ask this question, since I was considering asking it myself! I think perhaps Rei's AT field was an "awakening" of sorts for her. I think after the death of Rei II she started having suspicions about her true identity and I think Kaworu confirmed that for her with their conversation, so, when Kaworu descended into terminal Dogma, I think Rei's true identity sort of came out and her AT field was at it's maximum since it's the 'first time' she's utilised it whereas Kaworu having known his true identity for a while, could change his at will. That's all I've got

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Thu Feb 18, 2010 9:10 am Sachi wrote: 1) At that point, in Terminal Dogma, Kaworu's AT-Field had either weakened due to the fighting with Unit-01, or he had weakened it himself in preparation of surrendering himself to Shinji. 2) Due to the proximity to Lilith, Rei's AT-Field was more powerful due to a sort of resonating force between the two bodies? If the remaining fraction of the soul was within Lilith, while everything was in Rei, than the soul worked in full against Kaworu's possible fraction of a soul.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Feb 18, 2010 10:24 am Both points are good possibilities. At the moment, I would add the following points for consideration: 3) Kaworu was salvaged from the ADO Adam, and as such currently lacks a core. He has been made to live in a Lilim body, so may not be able to reach his full potential in it. 4) Lilith may inherently be more powerful AT-Field-wise than Adam. Either by design or perhaps by some process where Adam's abilities are divided between its offspring. 5) There may not be that much of a difference. Kaworu's field encompassed the Geofront. Rei's was localised to get here though the first.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Feb 18, 2010 12:21 pm I thought the two AT Fields were equal.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Feb 18, 2010 1:11 pm ^ Yeah, me too. Rei didn't overpower his, she just canceled it out.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Feb 18, 2010 1:24 pm Correct me if I'm wrong, but didn’t the bridge crew say the second ATF to show up was stronger then the first?

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Thu Feb 18, 2010 2:50 pm My ep 24 translation wrote: Another A.T. Field, similar to the previous one...

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Thu Feb 18, 2010 3:35 pm child of Lilith wrote: Correct me if I'm wrong, but didn’t the bridge crew say the second ATF to show up was stronger then the first?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 18, 2010 4:36 pm child of Lilith wrote: Correct me if I'm wrong, but didn’t the bridge crew say the second ATF to show up was stronger then the first?

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Thu Feb 18, 2010 6:42 pm Reichu wrote: Guess the topic has nothing to argue about?

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Feb 19, 2010 12:32 am I believe it is the dub that says Rei's ATF is stronger.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Feb 19, 2010 2:00 pm Even if Rei's was hypothetically stronger, I'd peg it to Rei having a stronger force of will in that scene: "Leave Shinji the fuck alone And/Or St00pid Angle GTFO!!!!1" Kaworu was like "Eh, whatever's cool, yo. Die or live doesn't matter. Peace, brah."

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Feb 19, 2010 8:28 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Even if Rei's was hypothetically stronger, I'd peg it to Rei having a stronger force of will in that scene: "Leave Shinji the fuck alone And/Or St00pid Angle GTFO!!!!1" Kaworu was like "Eh, whatever's cool, yo. Die or live doesn't matter. Peace, brah."

Die or live doesn't matter. Peace, brah."

Die or live doesn't matter. Peace, brah."

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Sun Feb 21, 2010 5:26 pm Mad wrote: When wasn't Kaworu an angel?

[]:             Quote Post by galacticgalaxy » Sun Feb 28, 2010 7:37 pm Halicat wrote: I think perhaps Rei's AT field was an "awakening" of sorts for her. I think after the death of Rei II she started having suspicions about her true identity and I think Kaworu confirmed that for her with their conversation, so, when Kaworu descended into terminal Dogma, I think Rei's true identity sort of came out and her AT field was at it's maximum since it's the 'first time' she's utilised it whereas Kaworu having known his true identity for a while, could change his at will.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Mon Mar 01, 2010 7:30 am galacticgalaxy wrote: well as Rei (both past & present)'s deterimation to defend Shinji- kind of like a" friendship gives me strength " situation.
